behavior_summary: This script implements the item's U8P_SCIMOKG::look/inspect handler. When the engine invokes the U8P_SCIMOKG::look process for this object it displays a single player-facing bark: "Scimitar of Khumash-Gor" and then suspends/returns.
There is no branching, menu interaction, or external calls in the U8P_SCIMOKG::look routine; it is a minimal descriptive handler.
Item metadata present in the file (baseDamage, damageModifier, damage types, etc.) is separate from this U8P_SCIMOKG::look handler and is not referenced by the process.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SCIMOKG::look executes linearly: emit a Bark ('Scimitar of Khumash-Gor') then suspend/terminate the process.
No conditionals, loops, or calls are present in the U8P_SCIMOKG::look process — control flow is immediate display then suspend.
open_questions: Is the U8P_SCIMOKG::look handler invoked via a standard inspect/"U8P_SCIMOKG::look" action (processType 0x0208) or also via fast-area entry triggers in specific contexts? (inferred: standard inspect; confidence: high)
Are the item's combat-related metadata fields (damage, modifiers, isSpecial) consumed by other scripts/systems elsewhere? (inferred: yes, but not by this file; confidence: medium)

main_function.name: U8P_SCIMOKG::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description/name when the player examines or 'looks' at this item by displaying the text 'Scimitar of Khumash-Gor' and then suspending.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine's U8P_SCIMOKG::look/inspect interaction for the item (processType 0x0208).
